title: Helga Zepp-LaRouche - On the Brink of WWIII - Dec. 7th, 2014
description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Frank remarks by Helga Zepp-LaRouche, Founder and Chairwoman of the Schiller Institute.  If the average American knew how close we are to World War III, they would be out in the streets, demanding a change of the current Obama Administration's policy.  And the need to build the New Silk Road Project.
